productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Blue Shirt
description: Composition Light blue shirt made of 100% cotton, with a spread collar, full front buttoned placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, contrast placket, embroidery above the hem and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron do not iron directly on print/embroidery Add immense style to your semi-formal look with this light blue shirt from united colors of benetton. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The full arm sleeves add a touch of regality to your personality. Pair it with jeans or corduroys and suede shoes for that perfect look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
